_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v14: NO dedup, full data. goof 2000, leduc 9414, liars 9470, gin 1076, hex 2797, oth 2654, clob 9185. System prompts match eval. HF synced. 6 machines 540 workers collecting gin/hex/oth.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-27: v14 deployed. All system prompts verified match eval. No think blocks. Full fine-tune target.

NAVWORLD.notes: V8 batch7 done. 7457 canonical (+3287 this session). Target 10K. Need ~2543 more.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-27: 4330 canonical. All 160 new entries validated. 100% tool coverage.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 1370 canonical. 40 workers on m1. 3051/3679 attempted (83%), 26% success. GPT-5.4.

LIVEWEB.notes: v20 AUDITED. 17108 entries (downsampled from 25205). Capped 200/template, removed 8097 near-dupes. 4161 unique templates. 0% think. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-27: deep audit. 46% near-dupes removed. 35 templates capped at 200. All 17108 pass validation. HF synced.

LGC-v2.notes: EXCLUDED — user directive: 4-env only, no LGC-v2/PRINT training. Data exists but not used.
LGC-v2.audit: 2026-03-19: verified 1500 entries, schema OK. EXCLUDED from training per user directive.

PRINT.audit: 2026-03-19: verified 1500 entries, schema OK. EXCLUDED from training per user directive.

MEMORYGYM.notes: v4c: 20000 balanced per-event samples. Mixed tiers (lite 30%/standard 50%/hard 20%). Distribution: ingest 30%/correction 20%/question 40%/noise 10%. Median 1.5K tokens, max 10.3K, 0% >32K. 388 contradiction detections, 1551 triage reasonings, 0 format errors, 63% correction search→edit. HF synced.
MEMORYGYM.audit: 2026-03-27: v4c. Tier mix rebalanced to match eval (standard 50%). 10+ self-attacks passed. All quality checks green.

training_mix_summary._note: 5-env mix. GAME v13, NW v8, SWE-I 1140, LW v20 (deduped), MG v4 (20K balanced, mixed tiers).

pending_tasks: NW v8 generating toward 10K. SWE-I distilling on m1. MG v3 complete.
